_comment: Head Hunter project settings for Claude Code. Commit this to git. Personal overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored).

PostToolUse._description: Warn when the model ID changes in claude.js
PostToolUse.command: grep -nE 'claude-(opus|sonnet|haiku)-[0-9]' src/lib/claude.js && echo '>>> Model IDs found above. Verify none are deprecated.'

PreToolUse._description: Confirm before editing the deployed edge function
PreToolUse.command: echo '>>> About to edit a deployed edge function. Remember to run /deploy-edge-function after.'

SessionStart._description: Display project status at session start
SessionStart.command: echo 'Head Hunter' && git log -1 --oneline && echo '---' && echo 'Skills available: deploy-edge-function, test-pipeline, model-swap, ship-it' && echo 'Agent: code-reviewer (invoke with: "ask the code-reviewer subagent to...")'

env._comment: Env vars loaded in every Claude Code session for this project
